calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2025 Vacated

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Bifurcation
Off Calendar Jan-23-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Jan-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT CRICUT, INC.'s Motion To Compel Discovery Responses.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff must serve code-compliant responses without objections no later than January 30, 2025. Defendant is awarded reasonable monetary sanctions of $3,000, which must be paid by January 30, 2025.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/HEK)

Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Bifurcation
Off Calendar Dec-31-2024 Continued To Jan-27-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT CRICUT, INC.'s Amended Motion For Bifurcation.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. The motion to bifurcate is transferred to Department 206 on the day of trial, January 27, 2025, to be heard by the assigned trial judge.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/CEK)

Defendant Cricuts Notice Of Motion And Motion For Bifurcation
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2024 Continued To Jan-27-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar May-14-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT CRICUT, INC.'s Motion To Compel Discovery Responses.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Evan J. Smith, Esq., of BRODSKY SMITH, (877) 534-2590, for Plaintiff.
Dylan J. Crosby, Esq., of PAUL HASTINGS LLP, (415) 856-7000, for Defendant.
